channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: The heist of 100,000 eggs in Pennsylvania becomes a whodunit that police have yet to crack
item.description: ANTRIM TOWNSHIP, Pa. (AP) — The heist of 100,000 eggs from the back of a trailer in Pennsylvania has become a whodunit that police have yet to crack.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US officials now say Trump only wants to displace Palestinians from Gaza temporarily
item.description: GUATEMALA CITY (AP) — President Donald Trump’s top diplomat and his main spokesperson on Wednesday walked back the idea that he wants the permanent relocation of Palestinians from Gaza, after American allies and even Republican lawmakers rebuffed his suggestion that the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: With Gaza rehab and other global policy ideas, Trump goes from America First to America Everywhere
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump promised voters an administration that wouldn’t waste precious American lives and taxpayer treasure on far-off wars and nation building.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US to seize Venezuelan president's plane held in Dominican Republic during Rubio visit
item.description: SANTO DOMINGO, Dominican Republic (AP) — The Trump administration plans to seize a second plane belonging to Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro ’s government that is currently in the Dominican Republic.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Temple University police say 2 students, 1 former student impersonated ICE agents on campus
item.description: Two current students and one former student at Temple University were identified by campus police after allegedly impersonating U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In their own words: What Trump said about Gaza and how top administration officials contradicted him
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Top Trump administration voices on Wednesday contradicted some of the comments the president made a day earlier about the U.S. taking long-term control of war-shattered Gaza, the possibility of sending in American troops and the area’s residents being permanently resettled.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: As case involving Prince Harry's immigration paperwork inches forward, judge considers next steps
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge is considering next steps in a slow-moving court case over whether to release documents that could spell legal trouble for Prince Harry, with an influential conservative think tank seeking to reveal if he lied on his immigration paperwork about past drug use or rece
item.dc:creator: ASHRAF KHALIL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New process simplifies uncontested joint divorce in New York
item.description: The streamlined divorce process is availble whenever both parties have already agreed on financial arrangements, property division, and child custody.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, NewsNation

item.title: Japan Airlines plane clips Delta flight at Sea-Tac airport
item.description: The right wing of a Japan Airlines plane hit the tail of a Delta Air Lines plane at 10:40 a.m. There were no injuries, the Port of Seattle told the Seattle Times.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Trump is targeting antisemitism in schools. Experts fear other civil rights will be ignored
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The federal office that enforces civil rights at schools across the U.S. has been ordered to prioritize complaints of antisemitism above all else as it molds to President Donald Trump’s agenda, raising fears that other rights violations will go unpunished.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY and BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Protests erupt around the country against the new Trump administration's policies
item.description: Protesters in cities across the U.S. hit the streets to voice their objection to President Donald Trump's priorities when it comes to immigration reform, gender, and labor.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 29 Indiana dealers sentenced to 378 total years after large drug ring bust
item.description: Court records show the drug ring stretched from Evansville and into Kentucky, but the two ring leaders were in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Wells, NewsNation

item.title: Trump signs executive order intended to bar transgender athletes from girls' and women's sports
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order on Wednesday intended to ban transgender athletes from participating in girls' and women’s sports.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Democrats accuse DOGE of going after NOAA
item.description: Democratic lawmakers on Wednesday accused Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) of improperly inserting itself into the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA). In a joint statement, Reps. Zoe Lofgren (D-Calif.) and Jared Huffman (D-Calif.
item.dc:creator: Zack Budryk, NewsNation

item.title: Police seek motive after a suspect was arrested for a fatal shooting at an Ohio cosmetics warehouse
item.description: NEW ALBANY, Ohio (AP) — A man accused of shooting to death a coworker and wounding five others at an Ohio warehouse has spoken with police as they probe for a motive, authorities said Wednesday, hours after he was arrested in an apartment.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big Game Bound: Pros detail offensive matchup battle in Super Bowl LIX
item.description: When it comes to offense, both the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles are firing on all cylinders heading into Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: McConnell slips and falls outside Senate Chamber
item.description: Former Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.) slipped and fell on the stairs leaving the Senate Chamber on Wednesday afternoon, prompting concerned aides to rush to help the 82-year-old lawmaker.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WATCH: Crews save unresponsive man in spinning boat on Florida lake
item.description: A man found unresponsive inside a boat that was driving in circles was saved by Florida authorities on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Armed teen arrested at Arkansas airport after allegedly demanding plane
item.description: After the employees got to safety, the suspect "breached through a door onto the airfield," an airport official said.
item.dc:creator: Hunter Trombetta, ABC 4

item.title: Pam Bondi sworn in as attorney general in Oval Office
item.description: “I know I'm supposed to say, ‘She's going to be totally impartial with respect to Democrats.’ And I think she will be as impartial as a person can be,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Suspect arrested after shooting at Ohio cosmetics facility leaves 1 dead, 5 injured
item.description: Officials announced that Foster had been arrested by U.S. Marshalls after a manhunt that stretched through the night.
item.dc:creator: Brett Mills, Fox 5

item.title: Bill would allow schools to opt out of enrolling undocumented students
item.description: Senate Democratic leadership responded to the bill Tuesday, calling it "unconstitutional" and "prejudiced.
item.dc:creator: Alicia Patton, NewsNation

item.title: US allies, adversaries reject Trump suggestion to 'take over' Gaza Strip
item.description: When the president was asked about possibly sending in U.S. troops to Gaza, he said America will “do what is necessary.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Suspect arrested after one dead, 5 injured in New Albany mass shooting
item.description: For the latest updates in New Albany warehouse shooting, follow this link. NEW ALBANY, Ohio (WCMH) -- A man is in custody after one person was shot dead and five others were injured after a shooting Tuesday night at a New Albany warehouse. According to authorities, U.S.
item.dc:creator: Brett Mills, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk shocks lawmakers, setting himself on collision course
item.description: Billionaire businessman Elon Musk is on a collision course with lawmakers on Capitol Hill who are starting to challenge his authority.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Chilean migrant gangs terrorize Americans with home invasions: what to know
item.description: A law enforcement veteran describes how people can defend themselves after Chilean migrant burglary rings continue to target American homeowners.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Suspect arrested after one dead, 5 injured in New Albany mass shooting
item.description: For the latest updates in New Albany warehouse shooting, follow this link. NEW ALBANY, Ohio (WCMH) -- A man is in custody after one person was shot dead and five others were injured after a shooting Tuesday night at a New Albany warehouse. According to authorities, U.S.
item.dc:creator: Brett Mills, KRON4

item.title: Mmm, that looks yummy! The colors we see make a difference in the food we eat
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — You know you've said it. We all have. “Mmm, that looks so delicious — I want to try some!” That's because when it comes to what we eat, it's not just a matter of taste.
item.dc:creator: DEEPTI HAJELA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Waffle House adding surcharge for every egg ordered
item.description: Waffle House restaurants across the nation added a 50-cent surcharge to every egg ordered amid soaring prices due to inflation and the bird flu epidemic.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Purges at FBI, DOJ trigger 'battle' for career staff
item.description: The Trump administration has removed dozens of Department of Justice (DOJ) and FBI officials and is eyeing firing perhaps thousands more in an unprecedented purge that may just be getting started.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, ABC 4

item.title: El Salvador offers to accept deportees from US of any nationality, including Americans: Rubio
item.description: The U.S. government cannot deport American citizens and such a move would be met with significant legal challenges.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump agrees to pause tariffs on Canada and Mexico after they pledge to boost border enforcement
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Monday agreed to a 30-day pause on his tariff threats against Mexico and Canada as America's two largest trading partners took steps to appease his concerns about border security and drug trafficking.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ROB GILLIES and FABIOLA SÁNCHEZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5
